Project state and trade-offs — month 8

Status across project variables:

Schedule. Currently green at the milestone level, though there has been pressure on the integration workstream. The team has worked through it and we remain on track for November launch.

Scope. Stable. The documented scope is being delivered. Two minor architectural adjustments were made but did not affect the scope baseline — they were absorbed within the sprint cadence.

Cost. Tracking within the £8m baseline. Cost contingency is available if needed.

Risk. The RAID register has been actively maintained. 12 active risks, down 3 from start of quarter. The trend is positive.

Notable observations:

- The integration workstream had a difficult six weeks but the team rallied and we are caught up.
- The compliance review surfaced a data-residency issue which the architect resolved efficiently.
- The authentication framework swap was handled by the team within existing capacity.

Sponsor relationship is strong. Steering committee feedback has been positive. The team is delivering well under pressure.

Recommendation: maintain current approach. Continue active risk management. Sustain the team performance that has carried us through the integration workstream challenge.

— Coordinator
